key_drivers: Real yields falling sharply (DFII10 at 1.87%, down from 2.0%+), providing the single strongest bullish catalyst across gold, tech, and risk assets
Iran war/Strait of Hormuz blockade: IEA declares largest-ever oil supply disruption (~8-10M bpd), driving geopolitical risk premium into commodities and safe havens
RBA surprise back-to-back rate hike to 4.10% today; BoJ hawkish bias ahead of March 18-19 meeting; pre-FOMC uncertainty caps FX conviction

fallbacks_used: Copper price from CME/MarketWatch/Trading Economics (Investing.com blocked by policy)
data_quality.notes: All primary data sources accessed fresh as of 2026-03-17. FRED DFII10 updated same day. VIX from CBOE. MOVE from TradingView. EIA data for week ending Mar 6 (latest available). Pre-FOMC and pre-BoJ meeting environment reduces confidence on rate-sensitive instruments by 1 point.
